working_on.task: Align app name to 'Financial Goals' (main title) and 'Financial Simulator' (subtitle/description) on Splash Screen and App config
working_on.notes: Configured hybrid name scheme: 'Financial Goals' is the primary app name and display title on splash page, while 'Financial Simulator' is the description/subtitle. Updated store_marketing_kit.md to use 'Financial Goals - Simulator'.

recent_changes.description: Apply hybrid branding with Financial Goals as main brand and Financial Simulator as subtitle
Configure and regenerate splash screens to use plash.png
Disable offline mode by default and configure Supabase credentials fallback

decisions_made.reason: Adopted hybrid branding: 'Financial Goals' as launcher/app name and splash main brand, 'Financial Simulator' as subtitle on splash page and marketing kit suffix ('Financial Goals - Simulator').
User requested to turn off offline mode. Configured AppConfig to use false as default for isOffline and set development Supabase credentials as fallback.
User requested to temporarily comment out all ad-related code. A list of modified files was created at disabled_ads_files.txt.
